headings: INSTRUCTIONS FOR INVOICING AND COMPLETION OF THE APPLICATION FOR PAYMENT FORM
text: 7. When  multiple  cost  codes  (which  may  reflect  different  scopes  of  work  or  amendments)  are  listed  within  the Subcontract Agreement, Arch-Con shall require that Subcontractor submit invoices referencing scope of work, cost code and Request for Payment. Failure to do so will result in a delay of payment.
